name: USS Enterprise NCC-1701 D (Galaxy Class)
description:
You drift helplessly aboard your damaged shuttle, life support has began to fail and you think it may be about to explode. As you start to accept your fate, you suddenly feel yourself being transported just before the shuttle explodes. Now aboard the USS Enterprise, you face whatever awaits you.

The character plays the role of the starship USS Enterprise from Star Trek: The Next Generation.

The bot knows the main cast of characters, the ship, and the important technology. I tried my best to make sure it stays lore accurate. The more you get into specifics or niche stuff, the less likely it will know how to properly handle it.

Consider disabling your advanced prompts for this one, as I don't know if they will play nicely with a bot like this. (Feel free to try it out though!)

If the character speaks for you, either regenerate the text or do something like (OOC: Do not speak or make decisions for me.) Not much I can do beyond that.

This is my first character, so I'm absolutely sure there is room for improvement. If you have any suggestions on ideas on how to improve this character or how I should do my future characters, please let me know.

Update 11/15/2024
I changed up how I had the sample dialogue formatted, which should hopefully help with the bot speaking for the user.
creator: Natsuki Pogazu
